last_concepts: market_reaction: Broadcom Q2 FY2026 miss — $22.19B reported vs $22.27B expected ($80M gap), ~$1T in semiconductor market cap erased in one session; markets price the distance between reality and expectation, not reality itself

educational: The first 15 minutes after market open trap — spreads widest, institutions executing pre-planned orders, price discovery still running; retail traders mistake the chaos for signal and walk into a machine feeding frenzy
trader_psychology: The winning streak creates certainty, certainty doubles position size and removes stops, and one trade resets everything; JT carries the wax from that session as permanent evidence
